SoK: Connecting the Dots in Privacy-Preserving ML — Systematization of MPC Protocols and Conversions Between Secret Sharing Schemes

Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials with Highly Efficient Partial Disclosure
**Omid Mirzamohammadi**, Jan Bobolz, Mahdi Sedaghat, Emad Heydari Beni, Aysajan Abidin, Dave Singelée, and Bart Preneel. *IACR Communications in Cryptology, Vol. 2, No. 3, 2025.* [Paper](https://cic.iacr.org/p/2/3/15) ::: ::: {.pub}
